judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing execute_python step (function-call-17924491885778729575), the agent computed DCA returns using monthly first trading days and incorrectly valued the final portfolio with group['CloseUSD'].iloc[-1] from the monthly subset instead of the true latest close per index, leading to an incorrect top-5 ranking that omitted 000001.SS and NYA.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent queried only the first and last "Adj Close" per index since 2000 (function-call-15017430552549906343) and computed a simple buy-and-hold return in Python (function-call-9508177029771886782) instead of simulating regular monthly investments, leading to the wrong top 5 indices.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s SQL filter "Date >= '2000-01-01'" on a non-ISO string Date column (query_db) let pre‑2000 rows through, and it never re-filtered by year ≥2000 in execute_python, instead summing FinalCloseUSD/CloseUSD over all months, which skewed the rankings and led to an incorrect top 5.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing execute_python step (function-call-16782779672788479420), the agent computed dollar-cost-averaging returns using the 'Adj Close' column from index_trade instead of the USD-normalized 'CloseUSD', leading to mis-ranked indices and omission of 399001.SZ, NSEI, and 000001.SS from the top 5.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing execute_python step (function-call-10716229384991040413), the agent computed dollar-cost-averaged returns by valuing each index’s monthly purchases at that index’s own last available close (not a common end date) and used a hard-coded mapping that omitted “NSEI,” leading to mis-ranked top 5 indices and an “Unknown Country” for NSEI.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
